_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in applying organization-specific systems analysis principles and techniques.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including stakeholder interviews, artifact review, maturity scoring, and finding synthesis.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.539), DA-S-003 (DA, cosine: 0.534).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.602). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, applying, organization, principles, specific, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, assessments, conducting, data, diagnostic] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.903, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.043 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in applying organization-specific systems analysis principles and techniqu" and "Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.545 < STS 0.602 (gap -0.057). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analysis, applying, organization] and [ai, artifact, assessments] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [analysis, applying, organization, principles, specific, systems]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, assessments, conducting, data, diagnostic].
